prompt: Create a highly realistic cinematic fantasy portrait of an anthropomorphic gray tabby cat adventurer standing full-body on a narrow forest path. The character has a natural feline head and paws, short dense gray-beige fur, subtle tabby markings, bright blue eyes, upright ears, and a calm serious expression, with humanlike posture and proportions. Dress the traveler in worn medieval ranger clothing: layered frayed linen tunic, rough brown cloak and scarf, leather shoulder straps, belts, bracers, patched trousers, wrapped boots shaped around cat paws, and weathered fingerless gloves. Add exactly 7 prominent gear elements: 1 large overstuffed canvas-and-leather backpack with a rolled blanket on top, 2 leather chest straps with brass buckles, 3 belt pouches, 4 a coiled rope hanging from the pack, 5 a round metal cup or ring attached at the side, 6 two sheathed short daggers at the waist, and 7 a walking stick or wooden handle strapped behind the pack. Use an earthy palette of moss green, mud brown, taupe, tan, dark leather, and muted brass. Set the scene in an old woodland with tall tree trunks, damp leaf-litter ground, soft mist, and warm morning sunlight filtering from the upper left through blurred foliage. Compose as a vertical 2:3 image, centered subject, eye-level camera, full-body view, shallow depth of field, detailed fur and fabric textures, gritty practical costume design, photorealistic concept art, cinematic lighting, no text, no watermark, no cartoon styling.
